uplink.description: heartbeat with on-device GPS fix (level + position + battery)
uplink._note: Synthetic 26-byte GPS heartbeat. Wire layout taken from the upstream TTN example; lat/lon words replaced with in-bounds IEEE-754 LE coordinates (~35.4N, 97.5W, Oklahoma). expected.data was produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js on this input and normalizing: volt 360 -> battery 3.60 V (volt is hundredths of a volt), lat/lon strings -> numbers under position.*, raw counters kept as extras.

uplink.description: heartbeat without GPS (no position fix published)
uplink._note: 18-byte heartbeat with GPS disabled (matches the upstream TTN no-GPS example input). No position.* is emitted because the frame carries no fix; volt 360 -> battery 3.60 V.

17-byte configuration packet (byte[3]==0x03). Matches the upstream TTN parameter-packet example input; all fields are device config extras (no position fix in this frame). expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js.
DF556 only uses FPort 3; any other port is an error (matches upstream).
